status_label: corpus-proven production contract for observed approved branches (UniqueLivery=false only)

production.compatibility_fallback: other families only; car_carbonfiber exact SHA must not use fallback

tints.note: When WeaveColorTintA==WeaveColorTintB (common on T.50, ~#191919), lerp is constant; do not invent contrast

base_color.expression: Mix(ConstantColor(WeaveColorTintA), ConstantColor(WeaveColorTintB), Channel(TextureSample(WeaveMask), 'r')); then Multiply(., AO.B)
base_color.dxil: albedo = lerp(WeaveColorTintA, WeaveColorTintB, WeaveMask.R); BaseColorAlpha t17 sample does not contribute when UniqueLiverySwitchBool=false

normal.source: WeaveNormal TXMP (t36) — Principled Normal when present
normal.unpack: xy = sample.xy*2-1; z = sqrt(saturate(1-x^2-y^2)); xy *= WeaveNormal_Intensity (CB reg15.w)
normal.base_normal_t21: Also sampled in DXIL on TEXCOORD0; full NormalBlend(base, weave) pending. Principled uses WeaveNormal only (restores weave relief when A≈B).
normal.note: Legacy _prefer kept flat Normal (t21) over WeaveNormal (t36) — fixed in eval_car_carbonfiber.

uv.texcoord: TEXCOORD1 (fixed for WeaveMask + WeaveNormal — NOT UVChoice, NOT TEXCOORD0)
uv.scale_cb: reg14.y, reg14.z (uniform scaler applied to both)
uv.rmao_uv: TEXCOORD0 (fixed, ACTIVE, not affected by weave transform)

gate.name: UniqueLiverySwitchBool
gate.effect: false -> weave composite (approved); true/absent -> livery-mix branch (pending_review; reject)

blender_backend.constraint: compiler must not inspect MatI/TXMP/shader filenames; decisions live in evaluated ForzaMaterialIR
blender_backend.rotation_node: ShaderNodeVectorRotate (Z_AXIS) inserted before tiling scale in materials.nodes_v3._texture_node when slot.rotation_degrees != 0
blender_backend.pan_node: ShaderNodeVectorMath ADD inserted after tiling scale when slot.pan != (0,0)
blender_backend.normal_strength: ShaderNodeNormalMap Strength input set from CleanSurfaceCapability.normal_strength when != 1.0
